title: スプリンターズSの後に・カワイイ！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Curren Chan conquers the Sprinters Stakes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She smiles, looking extremely satisfied as the
packed racecourse lovingly chants, "Cute Curren
Chan!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan's followers increase tenfold. She
becomes the number one trending topic
worldwide and gets an unbelievable number of
likes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is how Curren Chan becomes the most
beloved runner in the world, both in name and in
reality. Next, she wonders who it is that loves her
most of all...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"Juuust kidding! I know it's you!" She shoots me an
irresistibly cute smile.
